body: public void testGenealogy() { // treat vowels and HW as silent
"D200", s.encode1("Dodds")); // 'o' is not a separator here - it is silent

body: public void testSimplifiedSoundex() { // treat vowels and HW as separators
Assert.assertEquals("D320", s.encode1("Dwdds")); // w is a separator
Assert.assertEquals("D320", s.encode1("Dhdds")); // h is a separator
translation: self.assertEqual("D320", s.encode1("Dwdds"))  # w is a separator
self.assertEqual("D320", s.encode1("Dhdds"))  # h is a separator
